title: Momonosuke Becomes Shogun
description: On pages 32–34, this part focuses on Unknown person #31, Unknown person #32, Unknown person #33 as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...by the meaty gravy and a romantic herbs!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Still... it's so odd. He's only:a boy...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: IT HAS THIS STRANGE, IRRESISIBILITY ADULT-ALLURE TO IT!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: It's as if I've gotten a glimpse...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...to see how Sanji's matured as a cook...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It had a decent amount of heat to it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But you've still got a ways to go, ya squirt!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The season- Ings! The cooking time! Everything needs work!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Learn how to put together a decent dish, squ/RT!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey! I deserve some respect after that dish! And stop calling me "Squirt"!

summary: This part advances the Wano Aftermath through 17 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
